title: Web Accessibility (WCAG) Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the international accessibility standards and the POUR principles.

questions.question: The four main principles of WCAG are shortened to the acronym 'POUR'. Which of these is NOT part of POUR?
Which level of WCAG conformance is the most commonly required by organizations worldwide?
What is the primary purpose of the 'aria-label' attribute?
options: To apply CSS styles based on a specific label.
To provide a textual description for an element specifically for screen readers.
To act as a tooltip that appears when a user hovers over an element.
To store data that will be sent through a form.

questions.question: What is the minimum recommended contrast ratio for normal text on a background according to WCAG AA?
